\tzpentry{ID4456}{Chemical Potential Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4456 introduces Chemical Potential Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\hat{\mu}_T = \mu_0 \cdot \exp\left( -\frac{\alpha_T}{\chi_T} \cdot \frac{\mathcal{H}_{\text{twist}}}{P_T \cdot V_{\text{core}}} \right) \equiv \left[ \epsilon_T c_{\text{eff}}^2(r) \right]^{-1}$$
